items.text: Do Edge and Nerve remain distinct in play? Risk: both can be called for fear-related rolls; verify Edge stays focused on alien-touched perception.
Does the heat / ship_wear pair feel different at the table, or do they collapse into 'meter that goes up'?
Are 4 abilities in ship_systems enough for a ship-heavy campaign, or does the category feel thin?
Does the GM keep ship_wear and heat described physically (sparks, smoke, the watcher in the bar) rather than as numbers?
Hook 2 (The Wreck) is heavier on alien menace than Hooks 1 and 3 — intentional?
Has the player reviewed content_to_avoid? Any other themes the table wants excluded?
No stages retried in this run. If patterns emerge across multiple generations (e.g. attributes recurringly producing overlapping pairs), revisit the prompt.
Which failure moves actually fired? Which never did?
Did Frontier Traits come into play, or were they paper background?
